docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT SHEPPARD. FILED BY MIXON, CHRISTINA PHIZZLE, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-27-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE STIPULATED TO SETTLEMENT: DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $8,00 CASH OR CERTIFIED FUNDS. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN COMPUTER (ASUS) IN OPERATING CONDITION, INCLUDING N VIDIA GRAPHICS CHIP. EXCHANGE TO OCCUR W/IN 30 DAYS OF DATE WRITTEN BELOW", PER PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT SHEPPARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN PEARY--CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MIXON, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT PHIZZLE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED OCT-03-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PHIZZLE, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PHIZZLE, INC
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-08-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 - USED SC-150 FORM AND LETTER FOR DECLARATION FOR RESET TRIAL OF SEP-05-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PROGRESS REPORT OF 11/8/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF REGARDING SETTLEMENT OF CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIXON, CHRISTINA
